privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real seismological data (the Noto earthquake, Jan 1, 2024) downloaded from GEOFON FDSN services, specifically for station GE.BKB. The target output file is verified to be /home/ga/extracted_BKB_BHZ.mseed as strictly checked by the export_result.sh script. The target station (BKB), network (GE), and channel (BHZ) are explicitly confirmed by checking the contents of the actual raw miniSEED file provided in the environment setup. A minimum file size of 512 bytes is confirmed as the standard size of a single miniSEED block.
